name: Ecommerce
description: A product-focused ecommerce template for TanStack Start
author: Jane Smith <jane.smith@example.com>

files../README.md:
# Ecommerce Template

This is a product-focused ecommerce template for TanStack Start (React, file-based routing).

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Build

```bash
npm run build
```

## What this template includes

- Catalog + product detail routes
- Reusable ecommerce UI components
- AI assistant wiring and demo tooling
- Add-on compatibility seams in the root shell (`integrations/**/{root-provider,provider}`)
- Demo route discoverability in the header (`/demo/*`)

## Environment

If you use the built-in AI assistant routes, set:

```env
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your_anthropic_api_key
```

## Notes

- Routes live in `src/routes`.
- `demo.*` files are safe to remove if you do not want demos.
- This template is intended to compose with add-ons (query, form, shadcn, store, strapi, etc.).

TanStack Ecommerce Template

The TanStack Storefront.

A polished ecommerce landing page for teams shipping with Start, Router, Query, Form, and friends. Same laid-back vibe as the blog template, but tuned for product catalogs and conversion flows.

Browse Catalog View Featured

{featured.name}

))}

Why This Template

  • Product-first landing page and detail flow with clean file routes.
  • Optional AI assistant support preserved for demos and experimentation.
  • Theme tokens match the same design language as the blog/base templates.

files../tsconfig.json:
{
  "include": ["**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx"],
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "types": ["vite/client"],

    /* Bundler mode */
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
    "noEmit": true,

    /* Linting */
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "noUncheckedSideEffectImports": true,
    "paths": {
      "#/*": ["./src/*"],
      "content-collections": ["./.content-collections/generated"],
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  }
}
